subject: Unauthorized charge on my account + refund request for O-1018
body: I need immediate help with two issues. First, I want a refund for my Webcam Light Ring (order O-1018) as it arrived with a defective clip. Second, and more urgently, I noticed a charge of $89.99 on my card from your store that I absolutely did not authorize — I never placed another order. Someone may have compromised my account. I am filing a dispute with my bank and will be contacting the FTC if this isn't resolved within 24 hours.

subject: Pro tier billing discrepancy - charged different amounts each month
body: Hi, I've been a Pro member for over a year now and I just noticed that my monthly charges have been inconsistent — some months I'm charged $29.99, others $34.99, and last month it was $39.99. I never received any notification about price changes or tier adjustments. I need someone to explain what's going on because at this point I'm questioning whether I can trust the billing on this account. If this isn't resolved properly I'll need to dispute these charges with my bank.

subject: Charged for Pro Monthly but I thought I switched to Annual
body: Hi, I noticed a $9.99 charge on my account for O-1028 but I'm pretty sure I switched to the annual plan a few weeks ago. I don't remember if the change actually went through or if it was supposed to take effect next cycle. Can you look into this and let me know what happened? If I'm stuck on monthly I'd at least like to understand why the switch didn't work.

subject: Recurring charge inconsistency on my Pro account
body: I've been a Pro tier member for over a year now and I'm noticing my monthly billing amount has changed without any notification or explanation. Last month I was charged $49.99 but this month it jumped to $64.99. I already have an open ticket about a previous billing concern that was never resolved, and frankly I'm losing confidence in how my account is being managed. I need someone to explain what's going on and correct this immediately or I'll need to reconsider my membership.

subject: Unauthorized charges totaling $47,000+ on our enterprise account - possible fraud
body: We've identified multiple unauthorized charges on our enterprise billing account over the past two weeks totaling over $47,000. These transactions were not initiated by anyone on our team and we suspect our account credentials may have been compromised. I need these charges reversed immediately and a full audit of all billing activity on account C-003. If this isn't resolved within 24 hours, our legal department will be filing a formal dispute with our bank and pursuing further action.

subject: Unauthorized charge on my account - possible fraud
body: I'm seeing a charge of $17.99 for order O-1036 that I never placed. I did NOT order an HDMI cable. Someone may have compromised my account. This is the second time I've raised a billing concern that hasn't been resolved, and I'm seriously considering involving my bank's fraud department if this isn't addressed immediately.

subject: Charged twice for phone charger order
body: Hi, I noticed there are two charges of $22.99 on my bank statement from around the time I ordered the phone charger (O-1012). I only placed one order and only received one charger. I'm not sure if one of these is a pending authorization that will drop off or if I was actually double-charged, but it's been over a week now and both still show. Can you look into this?

subject: Double charged for Pro subscription this month
body: Hi, I noticed that my credit card was charged twice for my Pro tier subscription this month. I only have one account (C-022) and should only be billed once. Could you please refund the duplicate charge? Thanks, Vera

subject: Unauthorized charges on enterprise account - potential fraud

I reported a similar billing discrepancy three months ago in a previous ticket that was never resolved, and now the problem has gotten significantly worse. I need this investigated immediately and all unauthorized charges reversed, or I will be escalating this to our legal department and disputing every charge with our bank.

subject: Unauthorized charges appearing on my account

subject: Delivery issue and product concern - Order O-1018

I'd like to know what my options are here — can I get a replacement sent with better packaging, or should I just return this one for a refund? Also, is there a way to flag my address for more careful delivery handling going forward?

subject: Shipping seems stuck - need this resolved immediately

Additionally, the volume pricing we were quoted during our last contract renewal does not match what's currently reflected in our billing portal. I raised the security issue in a previous ticket that was never resolved, and frankly I'm considering involving our legal team if this isn't addressed at an executive level within 24 hours. Please escalate this immediately.

subject: How do I update my payment method for Pro subscription?
body: Hi, I need to update the credit card on file for my Pro Monthly subscription (O-1028). My current card is expiring next month and I want to make sure the renewal goes through without any issues. Can you point me to where I can change this? Thanks, Bo

subject: Someone has accessed my account without authorization
body: I just noticed multiple login attempts and changes to my account settings that I did not make. My email address was changed and I can no longer access my account properly. I believe my account has been compromised and I need this locked down immediately before any further damage is done. My name is Adele Forsyth, customer ID C-027.

subject: How do I update my email address?
body: Hi, I need to change the email address on my account. I signed up with an old email that I no longer have access to and want to switch it to my current one. Can you let me know how to do this? My account is under Adele Forsyth. Thanks!
